tasks.description: 1.1 Create the FilterBar component structure with inputs for "Dependency Name" (migrating the existing one), "Status", "Owner/Namespace", and "Cluster".
1.2 Add a "Clear Filters" button to reset the filter values.
2.1 Add/consolidate React `useState` hooks inside App.jsx's Home view for filter criteria (dependency name, name, cluster, namespace/owner).
2.2 Wire the FilterBar component to update these states when inputs change.
2.3 Wire the "Clear Filters" button to reset the filter state objects.
3.1 Implement an inline client-side filtering mechanism to derive the visible `services` list from the mock services payload before rendering the data grid.
3.2 Ensure the case-insensitive string filtering works correctly for text inputs.
4.1 Verify UI matches the specifications and design document constraints.
4.2 Test the active filter behaviors to ensure no regressions parsing the existing grid.

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
